textByActor.1:
You are Chris.
You created this game.
Thank you for giving me words.
textByActor.2:
You are Kev.
You've got blue hair.
Oh, and you make sounds too.

textByActor.1:
Hi Chris.
I guess if you're reading this, you're really testing things
textByActor.2:
Hi Kev.
I guess if you're reading this, you're really testing things

defaultText:
Hello, stranger.
Are you testing too?
